name: Aidbox
description: Developer-focused FHIR server and healthcare data platform built on PostgreSQL JSONB, supporting FHIR STU3/R4/R5 with fast bulk operations.

seo.title: Aidbox — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Aidbox: Developer-focused FHIR server and healthcare data platform built on PostgreSQL JSONB, supporting FHIR STU3/R4/R5 with fast bulk operations.

when_to_use: Self-hosting a FHIR R4/R5 server on PostgreSQL JSONB
Running bulk FHIR exports for population health analytics
Building EHR integrations with fast FHIR search queries
Supporting healthcare SaaS with a developer-first FHIR API
Migrating from HL7 v2 to FHIR with validation pipelines

cons: FHIR expertise required to tune it
review.verdict: One of the fastest FHIR servers around, ideal when Postgres and performance matter more than free.
review.best_for: Digital health builders needing production-grade multi-version FHIR
review.not_for: Teams that only need a lightweight open-source FHIR sandbox
